acquisition method: All samples were analyzed in Data-Dependent Acquisition (DDA) mode
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 55 mM (IAA) for 1 h at 37 ° C in the dark
cleavage agent: digested with 1 µg of sequencing-grade modified trypsin (Promega AG, USA) or GluC endopeptidase
collision energy: collision energy setup at normalized collision energy (NCE) 25
fragmentation method: HCD MS/MS spectra were recorded in the FT-Orbitrap
instrument: analyzed on a calibrated Q Exactive™ mass spectrometer
labeling: the samples were treated in the same way throughout the whole analysis, therefore, by all applicable scientific reproducibility measures we can assume that any incomplete digestion, loss of analytes during extraction, and degradation during preparation are the identical between samples.
reduction reagent: dithiothreitol (DTT), and iodoacetamide (IAA) were purchased from Sigma-Aldrich
reduction concentration: reduced with 25 mM (DTT) in ABC buffer for 1 h at 37 ° C
